positive: A stylized, whimsical constellation map featuring glowing geometric celestial bodies (stars and planets) arranged in the recognizable silhouette of a leaping fox. The design should be set against a deep midnight blue background with subtle cosmic dust gradients. Use a bioluminescent ink aesthetic combined with clean, crisp vector lines. The overall composition must be centered, highly detailed, and perfect for a repeating apparel print or a large chest graphic. Style: Modern geometric minimalism, clean line art, digital illustration, strong contrast between luminous teal/gold elements and the deep navy background. Focus on symmetry and clear, bold outlines.
negative: blurry, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, low quality, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, gradient noise, muted, dirty, messy, photorealistic, 3d render, sketch, pencil, oil painting, abstract, messy background
